c.d: How intuitive and user-friendly the app is for both beginners and advanced users.
The range and quality of photo effects, filters, and presets available.
Availability of advanced features such as layer editing, masking, healing, and RAW image support.
The presence and effectiveness of AI-driven tools such as object removal, style transfer, and intelligent adjustments.
Availability on both iOS and Android platforms, as well as web or desktop versions.
The app's pricing model, including whether it's free, subscription-based, or has in-app purchases.
